title: WhatsappChannelConfig
description: TOML config for one wcore-channel-whatsapp instance. Secrets are keychain-handles only.

workspace_name.description: Human-readable workspace label (e.g. "acme"). Used for logging only.

phone_number_id.description: Meta-assigned Phone Number ID — the path segment in POST /<graph_version>/<phone_number_id>/messages.

default_recipient.description: Optional fallback recipient phone (E.164, leading +) used when OutgoingMessage.conversation_id is empty.

credential_handle_access_token.description: Key used to look up the WhatsApp Cloud API access token in the CredentialsStore.

credential_handle_app_secret.description: Key used to look up the Meta App Secret in the CredentialsStore — used for X-Hub-Signature-256 verification.

verify_token.description: Operator-chosen verify token for Meta's GET hub.challenge subscription handshake (must match the value set in the Meta App dashboard). Not a platform secret; when unset the GET verification handshake is rejected.

api_base_url.description: Override for the Graph API base URL. Defaults to https://graph.facebook.com — tests inject a mockito URL here.

graph_version.description: Graph API version segment in the URL path. Pinned per-instance so rollouts can stage version bumps.

max_retry_attempts.description: Number of attempts (including the first) before giving up on transient failures.
